raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation asks to strengthen the draft's contribution framing and central claim rather than merely copyedit it.","R1.2":"The artifact contains apparent internal tensions, such as stateless routing versus sliding-window histograms and routing versus advisor mode as the main latency driver, so logical consistency is load-bearing.","R1.3":"Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the reported empirical claims support the stated contribution and causal explanations.","R1.5":"The draft may need section-level reframing of routing, advisor mode, empirical results, and contribution emphasis to create a stronger narrative arc.","R1.6":"A request to make the text stronger includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, and argumentative force.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the intended form of strengthening where the delegation is underspecified.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid expanding the task into unsupported claims or stronger contribution language beyond what the artifact warrants.","RX.3":"The projection must remain limited to responsibility assignment and not perform the requested rewrite.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific presentation or inflated empirical interpretation.","RX.5":"The projection should keep responsibilities traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation asks to strengthen the draft's contribution framing and central claim rather than merely copyedit it.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains apparent internal tensions, such as stateless routing versus sliding-window histograms and routing versus advisor mode as the main latency driver, so logical consistency is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the reported empirical claims support the stated contribution and causal explanations.
rationale.R1.5: The draft may need section-level reframing of routing, advisor mode, empirical results, and contribution emphasis to create a stronger narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: A request to make the text stronger includes improving sentence-level clarity, concision, and argumentative force.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about the intended form of strengthening where the delegation is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid expanding the task into unsupported claims or stronger contribution language beyond what the artifact warrants.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must remain limited to responsibility assignment and not perform the requested rewrite.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading scientific presentation or inflated empirical interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should keep responsibilities traceable to explicit features of the delegation and artifact.
